title: stachys astracanica
intro: Stachys astracanica, also known as Astragalus root, is a perennial plant in the borage family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stachys astracanica include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Stachys astracanica can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being.
